US Postal Tracking › Mobile, AL › Pre-Shipment

USPS "Pre-Shipment" in Mobile, AL: Label Created — Awaiting Pickup

Your USPS package is awaiting USPS pickup in Mobile, AL. Real-time tracking updates and next steps for Mobile (South) area packages.

What Does "Pre-Shipment" Mean for Mobile Packages?

When USPS tracking shows "Pre-Shipment" in Mobile, AL, your package is awaiting USPS pickup. The Mobile USPS network in the South region serves 187,041 residents with 2 postal facilities processing approximately 150K packages daily. This status is one of the most common tracking updates seen by Mobile residents, and understanding what it means can help reduce anxiety about your shipment.

How Long Does "Pre-Shipment" Last in Mobile?

For packages in the South region, the "Pre-Shipment" status typically updates within 24 to 72 hours. However, during peak shipping seasons such as November through January, processing times at the Mobile Main Post Office can be longer due to increased volume. Packages shipped via Priority Mail usually move through this status faster than those sent via Ground Advantage or Parcel Select. If your package has been showing "Pre-Shipment" for more than 5 business days, consider contacting USPS directly.

What to Do When Your Package Shows "Pre-Shipment"

Here are the recommended steps for Mobile residents when their package shows this status:

  1. Wait 24-48 hours — Tracking updates are not always instantaneous, especially during busy periods at the Mobile Main Post Office.
  2. Check tracking online — Visit US Postal Tracking and enter your tracking number for the most current status.
  3. Sign up for notifications — USPS Informed Delivery sends automatic email and text alerts for packages headed to your Mobile address.
  4. Contact your local post office — The Mobile Main Post Office can provide additional details about packages in their system.
  5. Call USPS — Reach USPS Customer Service at 1-800-ASK-USPS (1-800-275-8777), Monday-Friday 8 AM to 8:30 PM ET.
  6. File a search request — After 7+ business days without updates, file a Missing Mail search at usps.com/help/missing-mail.htm.

Mobile USPS Post Office Information

Main FacilityMobile Main Post Office
Facilities2 USPS locations
Daily Volume150K packages
ZIP Codes Served36601, 36602, 36603, 36604
Standard HoursMon-Fri: 8:30 AM – 5:00 PM | Sat: 9:00 AM – 12:00 PM
RegionSouth
Population187,041 residents
Customer Service1-800-ASK-USPS (1-800-275-8777)

USPS Delivery Times to Mobile, AL

Estimated USPS delivery times for packages shipped to Mobile vary by service type:

ServiceEstimated Time
Priority Mail Express1-2 business days
Priority Mail1-3 business days
First-Class Mail1-5 business days
Ground Advantage2-5 business days
Media Mail2-8 business days

These times are estimates and may vary based on origin location, weather conditions, and current USPS processing volumes in the South region.

Landmarks Near Post Offices in Mobile

Key landmarks in the Mobile delivery area include USS Alabama Battleship Memorial Park, Mobile Museum of Art. Packages addressed to locations near these landmarks are routed through the Mobile Main Post Office, which serves as the central processing hub for the Mobile metro area.

Frequently Asked Questions

What does "Pre-Shipment" mean for packages in Mobile, AL?

When USPS shows "Pre-Shipment" in Mobile, AL, it means your package is awaiting USPS pickup. The Mobile Main Post Office processes approximately 150K packages daily, so brief delays during peak times are normal.

How long does "Pre-Shipment" last in Mobile?

In the South region, packages showing "Pre-Shipment" typically update within 24-72 hours. Mobile has 2 USPS facilities serving ZIP codes 36601, 36602, 36603, 36604, and packages may pass through multiple facilities before delivery.

Where is the nearest post office in Mobile, AL?

The main postal facility in Mobile is the Mobile Main Post Office. Mobile has 2 USPS facilities throughout the city. Standard hours are Monday-Friday 8:30 AM – 5:00 PM and Saturday 9:00 AM – 12:00 PM.

Can I pick up my package at a Mobile post office?

Yes. Bring a valid photo ID and your tracking number to the Mobile Main Post Office or any USPS location in Mobile. Packages are typically held for up to 15 days before being returned to the sender.

What should I do if my package is stuck on "Pre-Shipment" in Mobile?

Wait 24-48 hours for updates. If there is no change, contact USPS at 1-800-275-8777 or visit the Mobile Main Post Office in person. You can also file a Missing Mail search request at usps.com after 7 business days without an update.

Track Your Mobile Package Now

Enter your USPS tracking number at US Postal Tracking for real-time updates on packages in the Mobile, AL area. Our free tracking tool provides instant status updates for all USPS mail classes including Priority Mail, First-Class, Ground Advantage, and international shipments to and from ZIP codes 36601, 36602, 36603, 36604.
